message:
fix: update embedded skills tests for post-removal state

Commit 00f7327 removed all superpowers skills from the binary
(TDD, systematic-debugging, verification, brainstorming, etc.)
but didn't update the tests. Only ops-task remains as an embedded
skill. Updated 6 tests to reflect current state.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
